name: mb-claude-skills
description: Maurice Blackburn's free Claude skills for the marketing team.

plugins.name: mb-marketing
plugins.description: MB brand reference (colours, typography, logo, tone of voice, brand history), a conversational brand-vs-competitor comparison skill, a full social content toolkit (write, grade, and repurpose MB-branded posts for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and Meta), and a complete SEO and GEO toolkit (technical audits, ranking and AI-citation content writing, keyword and competitor analysis, backlink auditing). On-brand voice, curated hooks, and legal-marketing compliance guardrails built in throughout.
